basicDetails.schemeName: Scheme for Rearing Purebreed Gir/ Kankarage Male Cow Calves with Excellent Genetic Quality

nodalDepartmentName.label: Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Scheme for Rearing Purebreed Gir/ Kankarage Male Cow Calves with Excellent Genetic Quality” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare &amp; Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to encourage the rearing of Gir and Kankrej male cow calves of superior genetic quality. The primary objective is to ensure the availability of high-quality breeding bulls for pure breeding of indigenous cows across Gujarat.
schemeContent.benefits_md: **Component****Standard of Assistance****Minimum Time Limit (in Years) for Reclaiming Constituent Benefits**Scheme for rearing purebreed Gir / Kankarage male cow calves with excellent genetic qualityThe institution will be assisted upto 50% of the total cost with a maximum of ₹10,000/- for the maintenance of per calf in the first year and a maximum of ₹15,000/- per year for the maintenance of per calf in the second and third years.3 year
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to registered Gaushalas for rearing purebred Gir or Kankrej male cow calves with high genetic quality to promote pure breeding in indigenous cattle.

children.text: The “Scheme for Rearing Purebreed Gir/ Kankarage Male Cow Calves with Excellent Genetic Quality” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to encourage the rearing of Gir and Kankrej male cow calves of superior genetic quality. The primary objective is to ensure the availability of high-quality breeding bulls for pure breeding of indigenous cows across Gujarat.
Minimum Time Limit (in Years) for Reclaiming Constituent Benefits
Scheme for rearing purebreed Gir / Kankarage male cow calves with excellent genetic quality

The institution will be assisted upto 50% of the total cost with a maximum of ₹10,000/- for the maintenance of per calf in the first year and a maximum of ₹15,000/- per year for the maintenance of per calf in the second and third years.
The applicant may visit and apply online at I-Khedut Portal:
On the home page, click on ‘Schemes’ and then click on ‘Animal Husbandry Schemes’.
Now select the scheme, click on the ‘Apply’ button and an application page will open.
Click on "Apply New" button and submit a new application.
Click on the "Update Application" button to add corrections to the application.
Once the application is done, confirm it.
Take a print out of the online application and submit it to the board within 30 days of application with the signature and stamp of the
of the concerned district with the necessary documents listed in the application.
Applicant can also check their Application Status/View/Print/Upload Application details from the below link:

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** The applicant may visit and apply online at I-Khedut Portal: [https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/)
**Step 2:** On the home page, click on ‘Schemes’ and then click on ‘Animal Husbandry Schemes’.
**Step 3:** Now select the scheme, click on the ‘Apply’ button and an application page will open.
**Step 4:** Click on &quot;Apply New&quot; button and submit a new application.
**Step 5:** Click on the &quot;Update Application&quot; button to add corrections to the application.
**Step 6:** Once the application is done, confirm it.
**Step 7:** Take a print out of the online application and submit it to the board within 30 days of application with the signature and stamp of the [GGVB’s nodal officer](https://gauseva.gujarat.gov.in/Home/Address) of the concerned district with the necessary documents listed in the application.
**Step 8:** Applicant can also check their Application Status/View/Print/Upload Application details from the below link: [https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/public/frm_Applicant_Corner.aspx](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/public/frm_Applicant_Corner.aspx) 
> **Contact Us:** [Click here.](https://gauseva.gujarat.gov.in/Home/Address)

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. Gaushalas must be registered under the Charity Act.
   1. The institutions should have all the facilities for rearing calves.

> **Note:** The institutions where calves are reared will be selected by the Gauseva and Gaucher Vikas Board.

children.text: Gaushalas must be registered under the Charity Act.
The institutions should have all the facilities for rearing calves.
The institutions where calves are reared will be selected by the Gauseva and Gaucher Vikas Board.
